displayTitle: The High Republic Adventures Phase III: Dispatches from the Occlusion Zone #4
synopsis: As calls for help make their way across the Stormwall, the Marshal of the Republic Fleet turns to an unlikely ally: former Jedi Ty Yorrick! But can the maverick saber-for-hire be trusted when she encounters an old enemy on the ravaged plains of Dalna?
title: The High Republic Adventures Phase III: Dispatches from the Occlusion Zone #4
